tiktok-in-hubspot: HubSpot has joined other CRMs with the ability to post directly to TikTok from within HubSpot. Track TikTok engagement and users in your CRM using this private beta feature.
breeze-assistant: Breeze Assistant is HubSpot's AI-powered platform that provides expert answers tailored to your role. It helps with HubSpot workflows, best practices, and troubleshooting.
make-my-persona-ai: Make My Persona AI automatically generates buyer personas in seconds, eliminating the need for manual research. Available as a free upgrade to all HubSpot users.
data-enrichment-buyer-intent: Enhanced data enrichment now includes expanded EU contact data and richer buyer intent signals, helping you identify and engage high-potential prospects.
legacy-developer-accounts-migration: HubSpot is migrating all legacy developer accounts to the unified Developer Platform, streamlining authentication and API access for developers.
form-submissions-company-records: Form submissions from all associated contacts now appear directly on company timeline records, improving visibility into company engagement patterns.
rule-based-automated-tracking: Rule-based automated tracking lets you set intelligent conditions to automatically track companies based on their activity, replacing manual tracking workflows.
help-desk-recent-searches: Help Desk agents can now save and recall recent searches, making it faster to find relevant tickets and support their workflow efficiency.
filters-in-agent-inbox: Agent Inbox now supports custom filters, allowing agents to prioritize and organize work based on their specific needs and preferences.
